mapper.select: SELECT 'preRiskAssessment' AS title ,'/PreRiskAssessment' AS route ,'preRiskAssessmentDesc' AS description , case when preRiskAssessment.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_and_health_info_survey WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND confirm_yn = 'Y' AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{searchText} AND use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS preRiskAssessment UNION ALL SELECT 'classificationProcessEquipMsds' AS title ,'/ClassificationProcessEquipMsds' AS route ,'classificationProcessEquipMsdsDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN classificationProcessEquipMsds.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_classification_process_equip_msds WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND confirm_yn = 'Y' AND use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS classificationProcessEquipMsds UNION ALL SELECT 'ResultOfRiskAssessmentTraining' AS title ,'/ResultOfRiskAssessmentTraining' AS route ,'ResultOfRiskAssessmentTrainingDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN ResultOfRiskAssessmentTraining.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{searchText} AND use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS ResultOfRiskAssessmentTraining UNION ALL SELECT 'riskAssessmentTable' AS title ,'/RiskAssessmentTable' AS route ,'riskAssessmentTableDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN riskAssessmentTable.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_classification_hazards WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{searchText} AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{searchText} AND use_yn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation trai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan trap ON trai.write_year = trap.write_year AND trai.doc_no = trap.doc_no WHERE trai.write_year = #{searchText} AND trap.comp_id = #{compId} AND trai.use_yn = 'Y' AND trap.use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS riskAssessmentTable UNION ALL SELECT 'improvementAndImplementation' AS title ,'/ImprovementAndImplementation' AS route ,'improvementAndImplementationDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN improvementAndImplementation.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation trai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan trap ON trai.write_year = trap.write_year AND trai.doc_no = trap.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction trair ON trai.write_year = trair.write_year AND trai.doc_no = trair.doc_no WHERE trai.write_year = #{searchText} AND trap.comp_id = #{compId} AND trai.use_yn = 'Y' AND trap.use_yn = 'Y' AND trair.completed_date IS NOT NULL ) as exist ) AS improvementAndImplementation
